<!--
Small, focused PRs are welcome.
Large unsolicited feature PRs are usually not accepted.
If this change is broad, architectural, or proposes a new official plugin,
please open an issue first instead of opening a PR.
-->

## Linked issue

## Scope

- [ ] Small docs fix
- [ ] Small bug fix
- [ ] Focused maintenance change already discussed

## Test plan

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run lint`

## Changeset

- [ ] Added a changeset for user-visible changes
- [ ] No changeset needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused
- [ ] Docs updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] No security issue is disclosed here
